title: NeoTerritory Deploy Manifest
description: Declarative source of truth for what gets shipped to the AWS Lightsail host during `scripts/deploy-aws.sh`. Consumed by `ops/bash/deploy/lib/ship.sh`. Schema mirrors the package.json convention so the manifest is parseable, diffable, and obvious to maintainers.

_description.description: Free-form human note; ignored by the parser.

appDir.description: Absolute path on the remote host where the source tree is extracted.

binary.description: Path (relative to appDir) of the compiled microservice binary the backend invokes.

items.description: Path relative to the repo root that gets tarred and shipped.
Glob (tar --exclude syntax) that is dropped from the ship archive.
